COUSEL ARE DIRECTED TO NOTIFY JUDGE NICHOLS THAT A DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE CASE HAS BEEN FILED. ALL PARTIES SIGN A WRITTEN SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN OPEN COURT AND REQUEST THE COURT TO RETAIN JURISDICTION. THE CASE IS FOLLOWING VISITING JUDGE LESLIE NICHOLS. The court received the parties' proposed orders. The court adopts the tentative ruling issued on June 16, 2014, and has executed plaintiff's form of order granting the anti-SLAPP motion to strike.
